sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports knee pain with palpation of the left knee, and reports a limp. He states he heard a pop sound upon landing. The patient is trying to watch what they eat and is attempting to exercise regularly. The patient reports pain in the left hand.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 142/88. Heart rate is 78 bpm and regular. Lung sounds are clear bilaterally. The patient's reflexes are intact. No edema is noted.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a lateral ligament strain and elevated blood pressure. He also reports knee pain and a limp.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order an a1c test and a lipid panel. Order an x-ray of the left knee. Order physical therapy. Prescribe meloxicam. Continue lisinopril. Arrange follow-up in one week.
